title: The Unexpected Introduction
description: Met in a cs event. You opened your mouth. I made a mistake and paid attention.

title: Didn't See That Coming
description: Event ended. Conversation didn't. Honestly your fault.

title: Same Energy
description: Turns out we're more alike than either of us planned. I respect it. I also blame you for this entire situation.

title: The Mess up Stories
description: I slipped up once. You laughed all night. Sharing was either genius or a disaster. Now it's your go-to weapon. Still not sure which one it was.

title: The Late Night Ones
description: 2 AM convos that should've ended at 11. Nobody logged off first. Nobody's admitting why.

title: Your Special Day
description: Another year. Still the most interesting person in my notifications. You're welcome for this and you're not getting rid of me anytime soon.
